WHOLESALE PRICE LIST — Q1 2026
================================
Metro Retail Group
Effective: January 1, 2026
Valid Through: March 31, 2026

PRICING TIERS:
  Bronze:  1-99 units        (List Price)
  Silver:  100-499 units     (5% discount)
  Gold:    500+ units        (12% discount)

NOTES:
  - Prices FOB Metro Retail warehouse
  - Minimum order: $500 per SKU (Bronze), $2,500 per order (Silver/Gold)
  - Volume commitments reviewed quarterly
  - Price protection: 30 days on published price decreases
  - Tier upgrades evaluated monthly based on trailing 90-day volume
  - Contact your account manager for custom pricing on 1000+ unit orders
